svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"flowchart TD Start["connectAsync() called"] CheckPath{{"SQLiteFilePath
configured?"}} CheckConn{{"Already
connected?"}} Connect["Open database file"] WAL["Enable WAL journaling"] Done["callback(null, db)"] ErrPath["callback(error)"] ErrConn["Log error, callback(null, existingDB)"] Start --> CheckPath CheckPath -->|No| ErrPath CheckPath -->|Yes| CheckConn CheckConn -->|Yes| ErrConn CheckConn -->|No| Connect Connect --> WAL WAL --> Done style ErrPath fill:#f8e0e0 style ErrConn fill:#f8f0e0 style Done fill:#e0f8e0 ","style":"notebook"}
